import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import LanguageSwitcher from '../components/LanguageSwitcher'; import { t, getCurrentLanguage } from '../utils/translations'; const Home = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [language, setLanguageState] = useState(getCurrentLanguage()); useEffect(() => { setLanguageState(getCurrentLanguage()); }, []); return (
{/* Global Animated Background Elements (Under Everything) */}
{/* Navigation Header */}
navigate('/home')}>
🏠{t('home', language)}
{/* Hero Section */}

Welcome to Agmas Medium Clinic

A modern, fully integrated patient management system designed for exceptional healthcare delivery.

{/* Features Section */}

Cutting-Edge Features

Everything you need for modern, secure, and efficient healthcare management.

{/* Feature 1 */}
📅

Smart Booking

Schedule appointments directly with doctors and manage your visits effortlessly.

{/* Feature 2 */}
🚶‍♂️

Live Queues

Real-time queue tracking to instantly know your position and wait time.

{/* Feature 3 */}
📋

Digital Records

Securely access your medical history, prescriptions, and lab results 24/7.

{/* Feature 4 */}
💊

E-Prescriptions

Digital prescriptions sent directly to the pharmacy for rapid dispensing.

{/* Call to Action */}
{/* CTA Background Flare */}

Ready to Transform Your Health?

Join thousands of patients who trust Agmas Clinic with their healthcare journey.

{/* Footer */}
🏥
Agmas Clinic
Privacy Policy Terms of Service Contact Support

© {new Date().getFullYear()} Agmas Medium Clinic. All rights reserved.

); }; export default Home;
